# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

MOD = 998244353

def main():
    N, M = map(int, sys.stdin.read().split())
    result = 0
    for i in range(60):
        bit = 1 << i
        if not (M & bit):
            continue
        # Count how many numbers from 0 to N have the i-th bit set
        count = (N + 1) // (bit << 1) * bit
        remainder = (N + 1) % (bit << 1)
        count += max(0, remainder - bit)
        result = (result + count) % MOD
    print(result)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
